nodes.name: Stripe-breasted seedeater
nodes.summary: The stripe-breasted seedeater (Crithagra striatipectus) is a species of finch in the family Fringillidae. It is native to Sudan, Ethiopia, and Kenya. The stripe-breasted seedeater was formerly conspecific with Reichard's seedeater (Crithagra reichardi), but was split as a distinct species by the IOC in 2021. References
